rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Section 11.1801 governs charity care and community benefits requirements for charitable hospitals. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: To qualify as a charitable organization under Section 11.18(d)(1), a nonprofit hospital or hospital system must provide charity care and community benefits as follows:
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
